scripts.simulate:payment: cd .. && cre workflow simulate market-events -T staging-settings --trigger-index 0 --non-interactive --http-payload @test-payload.json --broadcast
scripts.simulate: cd .. && cre workflow simulate market-events -T staging-settings
scripts.simulate:prod: cd .. && cre workflow simulate market-events -T production-settings
scripts.deploy: cd .. && cre workflow deploy market-events -T staging-settings
scripts.deploy:prod: cd .. && cre workflow deploy market-events -T production-settings
